phases.title: Dispatch Queue & Orchestrator

tasks.title: Implement src/server/dispatch.ts
tasks.description:
NEW: `DispatchQueue` class — FIFO queue, `enqueue(

REVIEW FAIL (code): TYPE ERRORS & INCOMPLETE IMPLEMENTATION — FR-005, FR-008, FR-009.
  WHERE: src/server/dispatch.ts:108
  EXPECTED: Valid TypeScript types. Real WUD loop execution via docker exec. log_file recording in runs table.
  ACTUAL: TSC error on 'backend' property; runDispatch is a setTimeout stub; log_file not recorded.
  FIX: 1. Add 'backend' to SandboxOptions in src/server/sandbox.ts OR remove it from call in src/server/dispatch.ts. 2. Implement real docker.exec() in runDispatch. 3. Pass log_file path to startRun/finishRun or use recordRun.
  GATE: gates/T027-gate.sh
  REF: plan.md Phase 05 > Dispatch Queue & Orchestrator

tasks.title: Implement src/server/integration.test.ts
tasks.description:
NEW: E2E — start daemon subprocess, POST dispatch, verify container

REVIEW FAIL (code): INCOMPLETE TEST VERIFICATION — TR-008.
  WHERE: src/server/integration.test.ts

  ACTUAL: Test mocks SandboxManager, so it doesn't verify real Docker integration.
  FIX: Update integration.test.ts to use real SandboxManager (or at least don't mock the container creation if Docker is available in dev env).
  GATE: gates/T033-gate.sh
  REF: spec.md Section 7 > TR-008
